content:
Hi folks!

I'm following Wedson tutorial here:
https://youtu.be/-l-8WrGHEGI?t=2346

For him it shows "Rust samples", but it doesn't show for me.
It shows only these:

--- Sample kernel code
[ ]   auxdisplay sample (NEW)
[ ]   Build kobject examples (NEW)
[ ]   watchdog sample (NEW)

Do you know what I'm missing, please?
I think it's because the rust version. I'm updating here to 1.62.0
Leandro Coutinho has marked this topic as resolved.
